text: Inflation History: 2023. Average CPI: 179.8. Annual inflation: 5.7%. Food inflation elevated at 6.8%. Core inflation moderated to 4.3%. RBI maintained repo rate at 6.5% through year.

Inflation History: 2022. Average CPI: 172.2. Annual inflation: 6.7%. Exceeded RBI's 6% upper tolerance band. Driven by crude oil prices, Ukraine war impact. RBI raised repo rate by 250 bps (4% to 6.5%).
Inflation History: 2021. Average CPI: 161.3. Annual inflation: 5.1%. Post-COVID recovery pushed demand. Supply chain disruptions persisted. Food prices volatile. RBI maintained accommodative policy.

Inflation History: 2020. Average CPI: 153.5. Annual inflation: 6.2%. COVID-19 supply disruptions. Vegetable and pulses prices spiked. Lockdown distorted price patterns. RBI cut repo rate 115 bps to support economy.
Inflation History: 2019. Average CPI: 144.6. Annual inflation: 3.7%. Below RBI target of 4%. Food deflation in first half. Onion prices spiked in Q4. Core inflation at multi-year low.
Inflation History: 2024. Average CPI: 187.5 (estimated). Annual inflation: 4.8%. Within RBI tolerance band (2-6%). Food inflation moderated. RBI began easing cycle with 25 bps cut in Feb 2025.

Inflation History: 2018. Average CPI: 139.2. Annual inflation: 3.4%. Well within RBI target. Fuel prices elevated due to global crude. Core inflation stable. Government increased MSP for kharif crops.
